rewritten_requirements: The system shall ignore white-space characters (e.g., space, tab, newline, and return characters) from input text.
The system shall enable the WhiteSpaceAndCommentEliminator object to advance over white-space characters.
The system shall enable the WhiteSpaceAndCommentEliminator object to determine whether the next character is part of a comment by checking for ‘/’ followed by another ‘/’ or an ‘*’.
The system shall enable the WhiteSpaceAndCommentEliminator object to keep track of whether the current character is white space.
The system shall enable the WhiteSpaceAndCommentEliminator object to change state when a ‘/’ is encountered.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The compiler can ignore white-space characters (e.g., space, tab, newline, and return characters) from input text.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The compiler reads characters one at a time and from them determines the structure of the program. One small part of this process of reading the characters involves ignoring “white-space” characters...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The WhiteSpaceAndCommentEliminator object can advance over white-space characters.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: That is, this object’s job is to read input characters until all white-space and comment characters have been read...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The WhiteSpaceAndCommentEliminator object can determine whether the next character is part of a comment by checking for ‘/’ followed by another ‘/’ or an ‘*’.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the character following the first “/” is another “/” or an “*”, then WhiteSpaceAndCommentEliminator knows that it is now reading a comment...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The WhiteSpaceAndCommentEliminator object can keep track of whether the current character is white space.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: In each of these states, WhiteSpaceAndCommentEliminator behaves differently with regard to the next character read in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The WhiteSpaceAndCommentEliminator object can change state when a ‘/’ is encountered.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the object is in one state and the trigger event for one of its transitions occurs, then that transition’s activity is performed...
